problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway
hypothesis: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of CRISPR. CRISPR gene editing targeting specific pathway directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
